note: Both encoder and decoder load-or-refuse against this file. Any mismatch is a hard boot failure. Frozen by the M0 autopilot; do not hand-edit without re-running `npm run verify`.

model.rationale: M0 headless gates run against a self-contained deterministic transformer because the HuggingFace egress is blocked in the CI sandbox. The determinism-critical units under test (fixed-point softmax, argsort+bucket coder, crypto, harness) are model-agnostic. The real ONNX-Runtime-Web + Xenova/gpt2 backend is pinned separately below and exercised by the cross-arch tester (Chunk B) in a real browser for G2.

ortBackend.note: Used only by the Chunk B cross-arch tester in-browser. Never on the local-gate coding path.

tokenizer.note: Byte-level (identity) tokenizer for the reference LM. The ORT backend uses the Xenova/gpt2 BPE tokenizer, pinned via transformersJs above.

codec.rationale: logitScale quantizes fp32 logits to integers (round(L*1024)). bucketWidth is the robustness/capacity dial swept by `npm run sweep`; 512 is the recorded knee for the reference LM (smallest width with >=0.98 per-token decision agreement under a ~0.008-logit simulated cross-arch perturbation). The coding decision runs on snap-to-grid bucketed logits: only the top 2^k candidates that sit in strictly-separated buckets carry bits, so per-arch logit noise that does not cross a bucket boundary cannot reorder the coding set.

crypto.note: AES-GCM is the acceptable M0 spike AEAD. AES-SIV (nonce-misuse resistant) is the M2+ upgrade per the roadmap.
